title: Sumikkogurashi: The Crispies Adventure in Fluffy Land

title_lang.en: Sumikkogurashi: The Crispies Adventure in Fluffy Land
title_lang.zh_hk: 劇場版 角落小夥伴 從天而降的雲之冒險

synopsis:
The Sumikko town has been experiencing nothing but rain lately.
One day, something suddenly fell from the cloudy sky above!
"Are you okay?" When the Sumikko characters rushed over, they discovered it was a "Prince" and his "Attendant" from the Sky Kingdom.
The kingdom is currently facing a severe water shortage, and while the Prince is working hard to solve it alone, his Attendant looks worried.
Learning that a clue to solving the water shortage lies in the "Water Temple," the Sumikko characters join their new friends for a grand adventure above the clouds!

synopsis_lang.en:
The Sumikko town has been experiencing nothing but rain lately.
One day, something suddenly fell from the cloudy sky above!
"Are you okay?" When the Sumikko characters rushed over, they discovered it was a "Prince" and his "Attendant" from the Sky Kingdom.
The kingdom is currently facing a severe water shortage, and while the Prince is working hard to solve it alone, his Attendant looks worried.
Learning that a clue to solving the water shortage lies in the "Water Temple," the Sumikko characters join their new friends for a grand adventure above the clouds!
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
在角落小鎮裡，連日細雨綿綿，
炸物搭檔「炸豬排」和「炸蝦尾」的身體都變得濕濕黏黏的。
有一天，天空中突然有什麼從天而降！
角落小夥伴們趕緊上前查看，
發現那竟是來自「空之王國」的王子。
王子告訴大家：「雲的上方，也就是空之王國，正面臨嚴重的缺水危機。」
為了拯救陷入困境的空之王國
角落小夥伴們決定與王子一同前往天空，
展開一場充滿驚奇與感動的大冒險！

subtitle: Chinese,English
